trendingTopics.name: Residency permits
trendingTopics.sampleQuote: Permit processing is taking much longer than expected.

trendingTopics.name: Rental costs
trendingTopics.sampleQuote: Two-bedroom prices went up again this week.

trendingTopics.name: School admissions
trendingTopics.sampleQuote: Parents are comparing waitlists and deadlines.

problemBriefs.problemEn: Permit processing delays are creating uncertainty for newcomers.
problemBriefs.summaryEn: Users report longer waits, conflicting document guidance, and repeated in-person visits.

evidence.quote: The permit office asked for new paperwork after three weeks.
I got different instructions from two people on the same day.

problemBriefs.problemEn: Rent inflation is pushing households out of preferred districts.
problemBriefs.summaryEn: Conversation centers on price jumps, fewer listings, and tighter budgets.

evidence.quote: My landlord raised the price by 25% with no notice.
Affordable listings disappear in a few hours.

questionBriefs.canonicalQuestionEn: How long is residency permit processing taking now?
questionBriefs.summaryEn: The cluster reflects repeated questions about timelines, required documents, and office follow-up.

evidence.quote: Has anyone received their permit this month?
Do I need a bank statement or only the lease agreement?

questionBriefs.canonicalQuestionEn: Which schools still have openings for September?
questionBriefs.summaryEn: Parents are asking about availability, language tracks, and admission deadlines.

evidence.quote: Is there still space in any Russian-program school?

urgencySignals.messageEn: Permit delays are creating immediate visa-expiry anxiety for several users.
urgencySignals.actionEn: Post a verified permit update and escalation path in the documents channel.
